office_does: The sheriff leads county law enforcement, jail and civil functions, emergency response, staffing, training, and interagency public-safety work.
race_blurb: Incumbent Mike Morrison emphasizes enforcement and prevention with department continuity; deputy Stan Langlow emphasizes front-line command, patrol, morale, and communication.

candidates.summary: Morrison is the incumbent sheriff emphasizing enforcement, prevention, training, retention, emergency response, and partnerships.
highlights: Pairs enforcement with prevention and partnerships [S1]

safety.basis: His platform explicitly combines enforcement with prevention, producing a mixed safety posture.

experience.basis: Incumbency and department leadership establish a proven institutional record.

candidates.summary: Langlow is a sheriff’s deputy emphasizing front-line leadership, patrol coverage, morale, training, communication, and safety.
highlights: Serves as a county sheriff’s deputy [S1]
Prioritizes patrol coverage and front-line leadership [S1]

safety.basis: Patrol coverage and police capacity support an enforcement lean.

experience.basis: Direct department service supplies institutional experience, though he has not led the office.
